authorization.scope: narrow project-store dependency correction discovered before B1 implementation

discovered_gap.fact: ProjectGenerationProjection contains domain-owned camera, render, transfer, geometry, and layout values that the project store must encode and reconstruct.
discovered_gap.why_the_entry_is_impossible_as_written: Rust does not expose transitive dependencies for naming or constructing those domain types, while the accepted project-model intentionally owns neither serialization nor filesystem persistence.
rejected_workarounds: change the accepted project-model API to duplicate persistence DTOs
map persistence bytes in application or app
use debug text, discriminants, unsafe layout access, or another hidden bridge

correction.unchanged: all other WP-10B outcomes, limits, paths, stop conditions, proof classes, deletion gates, and hard-cutover rules

invariants: mirante4d-domain remains pure and unchanged; this correction permits dependency consumption, not domain edits.
mirante4d-project-store remains the sole persistence-byte and project-filesystem authority.
No application-owned DTO, compatibility bridge, alternate serializer, or additional dependency is authorized.
stop_condition: Any additional accepted dependency or lower-level API must change.
rollback: revert this correction before project-store B1 implementation; no runtime authority changes in this checkpoint
